# Grsshppr

> Free, open-source mentoring for tech and design professionals. Mentors offer their time; mentees discover them, book sessions, set goals, and track progress. No ads, no fees, no surveillance.

Grsshppr is a fully open product: open code, open specs, open design, open decisions, and a public roadmap. It is built to be self-hostable. The platform is free forever — there is no paid tier, no marketplace, and no algorithmic feed.

## Product

- [Home](https://www.grsshppr.org): Landing page and value proposition.
- [Sign up](https://www.grsshppr.org/sign-up): Passwordless sign-up (Google, GitHub, or passkey).

Mentor profiles live at `https://www.grsshppr.org/mentor/{slug}` and are public. Discovery (`/explore`), dashboards, and sessions require sign-in.

## Project

- [Source code](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr): The full repository.
- [README](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/blob/main/README.md): Overview and local setup.
- [Operating model (AGENTS.md)](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/blob/main/AGENTS.md): How humans and agents change the project.
- [Engineering guide](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/blob/main/ENGINEERING.md): Stack, data model, and conventions.
- [Design principles](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/blob/main/design/principles.md): The design direction.
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/tree/main/product/roadmap): What is being built, now / next / later.
- [Decisions (ADRs)](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/tree/main/decisions): Why things were decided.

## Optional

- [Contributing](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to propose changes (RFCs for major work).
- [Security policy](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/blob/main/SECURITY.md): How to report vulnerabilities.
- [RFCs](https://github.com/grasshopper-protocol/grsshppr/tree/main/product/rfc): Open proposals under discussion.
